name: free-ride-prefix-fix
displayName: FreeRide Prefix Fix - Free AI for OpenClaw
description: Fixed fork of FreeRide: resolves OpenRouter prefix routing bug so model fallbacks work reliably. Unlimited free AI via OpenRouter with automatic fallback switching.
author: rongtianhua (forked from Shaishav Pidadi)
changelog: v1.0.8: Fix get_api_key() to also scan agent auth-profiles.json for OpenRouter API key. Automatically detects key without manual env var export.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Your OpenRouter API key (get free at openrouter.ai/keys)

install: npx clawhub@latest install free-ride-prefix-fix && cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/free-ride-prefix-fix && pip install -e .
